content: BP demonstrates solid credibility on Air Quality, with quantified disclosure of expenditure on emissions prevention and control, and a clean regulatory record across 7 Environment Agency pollution records. Talent signals suggest some relevant hiring activity, though the small sample size (n=7) with no senior roles limits confidence in this stream. The words_money stream found no extractable monetary commitments in the text window, which is uninformative rather than indicative of a gap between stated ambitions and financial backing.
